# BRAW Toolbox

> BRAW Toolbox v3.0.0 now includes a Media Extension, so you can use Blackmagic RAW in QuickTime Player and Final Cut Pro natively!

- [BRAW Toolbox](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/readme.md): BRAW Toolbox
- [Buy on Mac App Store](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/buy.md): BRAW Toolbox is a one-time payment of USD$79.99 on the Mac App Store.
- [Educational Pricing](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/educational.md): Educational institutions can get a 50% discount when they purchase 20 or more copies through Apple School Manager.
- [System Requirements](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/system-requirements.md): BRAW Toolbox requires Final Cut Pro 10.6.5 or later.
- [Videos](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/videos.md): Below is a collection of videos created by third parties.
- [Installation](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/installation.md): BRAW Toolbox v3.0.0 introduced a Media Extension, allowing you to import .braw files natively into Final Cut Pro.
- [How To Use](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/how-to-use.md): This page explains how to use BRAW Toolbox in it's traditional/legacy way.
- [Media Extension](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/media-extension.md): BRAW Toolbox v3.0.0 contains a Media Extension allowing you to play back BRAW in QuickTime Player, Final Cut Pro and any other macOS applications that support Media Extensions.
- [Support](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/support.md): The best place to get support is the FCP Cafe Discord.
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/faq.md): Color Finale Transcoder allows you to convert BRAW files into ProRes quickly and easily, all via a very slick Workflow Extension. It's a great application that we highly recommend you purchase.
- [Troubleshooting](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/troubleshooting.md): You can access your User Library, by clicking on your Desktop, then holding down OPTION as you click the Go menu item in Finder. A Library option will
- [Workflow Extension](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/workflow-extension.md): BRAW Toolbox v3.0.0 introduced a Media Extension, allowing you to import .braw files natively into Final Cut Pro.
- [Toolbox](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/toolbox.md): BRAW Toolbox v3.0.0 introduced a Media Extension, allowing you to import .braw files natively into Final Cut Pro.
- [LUTs](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/luts.md): BRAW Toolbox v3.0.0 introduced a Media Extension, allowing you to import .braw files natively into Final Cut Pro.
- [HDR Workflow](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/hdr-workflow.md): BRAW Toolbox v3.0.0 introduced a Media Extension, allowing you to import .braw files natively into Final Cut Pro.
- [Stabilisation](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/stabilisation.md): BRAW Toolbox v3.0.0 introduced a Media Extension, allowing you to import .braw files natively into Final Cut Pro.
- [Collaboration](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/collaboration.md): BRAW Toolbox v3.0.0 introduced a Media Extension, allowing you to import .braw files natively into Final Cut Pro.
- [Metadata](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/metadata.md): The Synchronised Clip & Multicam Clip you import via BRAW Toolbox has full access to all the metadata within the BRAW clip.
- [Relinking Media](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/relinking.md): BRAW Toolbox v3.0.0 introduced a Media Extension, allowing you to import .braw files natively into Final Cut Pro.
- [Release Notes](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/release-notes.md): 🎉 Released:
- [Uninstall](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/uninstall.md): You can download the Uninstall tool here.
- [Credits](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/credits.md): BRAW Toolbox has been thrown together by Chris Hocking from LateNite.
- [Privacy Policy](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/privacy.md): This is the privacy policy for the BRAW Toolbox, macOS Application that is available on the macOS App Store and TestFlight.
- [Marketing](https://brawtoolbox.fcp.cafe/marketing.md): We'd love you to share and promote BRAW Toolbox!
